title: ChangelogEntry
description: A single customer-facing changelog entry describing one release, announcement, or update published through a changelog platform.

id.description: Stable identifier for the changelog entry.

title.example: New Subscriptions endpoint and updated webhook payload

slug.description: URL-safe slug for the changelog entry.

body.description: Full body of the changelog entry. Typically Markdown.
body.example: We've added a new `/v1/subscriptions` endpoint and added a `customer_email` field to the `invoice.created` webhook payload.

category.description: Keep-a-Changelog style category for the entry.

tags.description: Tags categorizing the entry by product area, audience, or surface.

audience.description: Audiences this entry is targeted at.

publish_status.description: Publication state of the changelog entry.

published_at.description: Timestamp when the entry was made public.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the entry was last modified.

url.description: Public URL where the entry can be read.

feed_url.description: URL of the changelog feed (RSS, Atom, or JSON) the entry belongs to.

release_version.description: Semantic version or release identifier associated with the entry.

related_api_changes.description: References to underlying API changes documented in machine-readable diffs.

deprecation.description: Deprecation metadata when the entry announces a deprecation.

channels.description: Distribution channels this entry was pushed through.

author.description: Author who published the changelog entry.

platform.description: Changelog platform that produced this entry.
